deterministicGenerator.compilingCodeReliability: high (108->122 tests across V3->V4, 0 manual product edits)

conclusion: For this use case, local LLM is best as REVIEWER/PLANNER (missing-module detection, scenario ideas, security/accounting review). DETERMINISTIC knowledge-driven generation (module-spec + engine templates + knowledge packs) is better for compiling production code: it produced V4 at 100% file autonomy with 122 passing tests, which the LLM cannot reliably do.
